Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: I notice that both cases follow a similar sequence Let me break down each event in A1 and see if there is a pattern

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Retrieving scanning placing aligning and preheating all seem like they are part of preparing the raw material That could be a step called Material Preparation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So maybe the steps are 1 Material Preparation 2 Assembly welding 3 Initial Quality Check sensor measurement 4 Surface Treatment apply coating dry 5 Final Quality Inspection visual check

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The measurement is done by a Quality Sensor so maybe that is a separate step However in the sample after welding it is immediately followed by measuring

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Alternatively maybe the initial quality check is part of the assembly process but that might not make sense

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait the visual check is done by an operator So maybe Surface Treatment includes applying the coating and drying and then Quality Inspection includes both the sensor measurement and the visual check

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I think the key is to group events that are logically part of the same process stage

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let me verify with the sample events Material Preparation includes retrieve scan place align preheat Welding includes pick up tool weld A and B Weld Quality Inspection is the sensor measurement Surface Coating and Drying is apply coating and dry Final Visual Inspection is the visual check Yes that works

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Material Preparation All steps prepare the raw material for processing Retrieving scanning for tracking placing on the table aligning for precision and preheating to the required temperature These are preparatory actions to get the material ready for assembly

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Welding The process of attaching parts using welding tools Picking up the tool and performing spot welds on corners This is the assembly step where the material is joined

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Weld Quality Inspection After welding the weld is measured to ensure it meets quality standards This is a critical check to verify the integrity of the welds before proceeding

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Surface Coating and Drying Applying a protective coating to the assembled part and then drying it to ensure proper adhesion and curing This step protects the part and prepares it for final inspection

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Final Visual Inspection A manual check by an operator to visually confirm the quality of the entire part including the weld and coating This is the last step before the product is considered complete

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Each of these groups represents a distinct phase in the manufacturing process with clear purposes and logical sequences The events are grouped based on their role in the process the resources involved and the temporal proximity
